title: ads: Source, XSLT, and Build Tooling for the Static Edition of Willem Elsschot's Achter de Schermen and Opdracht
description:
Source repository for the static conversion of the digital scholarly edition of Willem Elsschot's Achter de Schermen and the dedication ("Opdracht") to Tsjip. Contains the original Apache Cocoon 2.1.11 application (retired), TEI P4 XML source files encoded using the parallel segmentation method, revised XSLT stylesheets, and the Python + Saxon-HE build pipeline used to generate the static HTML edition published at centre-for-manuscript-genetics/achterdeschermen. Produced as part of the postdoctoral project 'Lots of Copies Keep Stuff Safe: Future-Proofing Digital Scholarly Editions' (2025–2028).

The texts of Achter de Schermen and Opdracht are © Erven A. De Ridder (Willem Elsschot)/Athenaeum – Polak & Van Gennep, Amsterdam. All rights reserved. The TEI XML encoding (markup, editorial annotation, and apparatus structure — not the underlying copyrighted literary text) is made available under CC BY 4.0. The build scripts, XSLT stylesheets, and conversion tooling are made available under the MIT License.

creators.name: Neyt, Vincent
creators.affiliation: Centre for Manuscript Genetics, University of Antwerp
